evals.prompt: How do I set up lazy loading in Angular?
evals.expected_output: Use loadComponent for standalone components or loadChildren for route files. All feature routes MUST be lazy loaded. No eager feature imports.

evals.prompt: How do I write a route guard in Angular?
evals.expected_output: Use functional CanActivateFn — class-based guards are deprecated. Inject services with inject(). Return true or createUrlTree for redirect.

evals.prompt: How do I bind route params to component inputs in Angular?
evals.expected_output: Configure withComponentInputBinding() in provideRouter(). Define input.required<string>() in the component. Angular auto-maps route params, query params, and resolve data to matching inputs.

evals.prompt: Working on app.routes.ts — how should I structure routes?
evals.expected_output: No logic in route config. Use guards for access control, resolvers for data pre-fetching. Lazy load all features with loadComponent or loadChildren.

evals.prompt: How do I use a resolver to prefetch data before navigation?
evals.expected_output: Create a ResolveFn<T> function. Use inject() to get services. Register in route config with resolve: { key: resolver }.

evals.prompt: How do I configure page titles in Angular Router?
evals.expected_output: Use title property in route data, or provide a custom TitleStrategy service for dynamic titles.

should_not_trigger: How do I set up routing in React Router v6?
How do I create route handlers in NestJS?
How do I configure nginx reverse proxy routing?
How do I set up Vue Router navigation guards?
